title: My son and I really enjoyed our Barrow Way walk
content: My son and I really enjoyed our Barrow Way walk. We were blessed with very good weather, and the journey gave us plenty of memorable moments together. The Woodford Dolmen Hotel was a fantastic place to begin the trip. We especially want to mention Ter Kelly - what a gem! We really appreciated his service, banter, and warm smile throughout the trip. Thanks again for organising such a lovely experience!

title: Thanks for everything for our trip last year on the Barrow Way
content: Thanks for everything for our trip last year on the Barrow Way. We had an amazing time. We loved all the places you selected for us. Even all the taxi drivers were amazing. Your package was very helpful and everything was easy to follow. It was a dream trip. We had such an amazing time and you did a great job we are looking at doing another trip, leaning towards the Wicklow Way.

title: Hiking the Causeway Coast in August 2024 was an unforgettable experience!
content: Hiking the Causeway Coast in August 2024 was an unforgettable experience! The breathtaking scenery, from dramatic cliffs to stunning beaches, made every step worthwhile. The route was well-organised, and the B&B hosts were incredibly welcoming and kind. Everything was perfectly arranged, making it a stress-free and enjoyable adventure. Highly recommend!

title: In August 2024, we - mother (64) and daughter (30) - signed up through TUI with
content: In August 2024, we - mother (64) and daughter (30) - signed up through TUI with Cliff from Walking Holiday Ireland for The Wicklow Way. It turned out to be a fantastic experience. It started with a mishap - I (mother) was foolish enough to leave my passport at home. Fortunately, we found a later flight that same day and finally arrived at our first B&B hours later, more tired and stressed than planned. We had Cliff on the phone many times during those hours. Throughout this whole time, he remained friendly, showed great empathy, and kept both the taxi driver and B&B informed, so everything worked out in the end. He had already won us over completely. Everything proved to be very well organised. All B&Bs were pleasant and well-maintained. The surroundings are truly beautiful. We wholeheartedly recommend The Wicklow Way with Cliff from Walking Holiday Ireland!

title: What an incredible experience hiking the Cooley Peninsula!
content: What an incredible experience hiking the Cooley Peninsula! The trails were perfectly marked and the views of the Mourne Mountains were breathtaking. Our B&B hosts were incredibly welcoming and the full Irish breakfasts gave us plenty of energy for our daily hikes. The luggage transfer service worked flawlessly. We especially loved the tranquil paths along Carlingford Lough. Worth every penny!

title: It was a superb walking holiday!
content: It was a superb walking holiday! The trails were challenging enough to be interesting but not overwhelming. Beautiful mix of countryside, mountains, and coastal views. The B&Bs were all excellent and the hosts very accommodating. Everything was perfectly arranged by Walking Holiday Ireland.

title: The walk on the Barrow River Way was one of the best hikes I've ever done
content: The walk on the Barrow River Way was one of the best hikes I've ever done. It was exactly what I was looking for. At times I thought I was walking through a fairytale landscape. Thanks to Walking Holiday Ireland for the perfect organisation. My special thanks go to B&B Orchard Grove, Bagenalstown, Carlow. I had such a lovely stay there that it was really hard to say goodbye.

title: Wouldn't change a thing!!
content: Wouldn't change a thing!! It was a great holiday. Transfers and contact with carriers were excellent. The locations of the B&Bs were excellent. Ireland was beautiful and friendly. Absolutely recommended for everyone!!

title: We had a great holiday
content: We had a great holiday. Contact and service were excellent — actually, there was no point for improvement. I would definitely recommend your organisation.

title: Hello Cliff! My sister and I both enjoyed our walking trip enormously
content: Hello Cliff! My sister and I both enjoyed our walking trip enormously. All the transfers and B&Bs were perfect. I recommended the trip to all friends who asked how it was. I hope you can keep the locations of the B&Bs. They are very special. We'll be back!

title: We enjoyed the Wicklow Way and also the two Barrow Way routes added to our trip
content: We enjoyed the Wicklow Way and also the two Barrow Way routes added to our trip afterwards. It was nice to spend a day walking along the river — a completely different experience. What a pleasure, what views (we were lucky with the weather). The B&Bs were well organised, and the transport from the B&Bs to restaurants was pleasant. It's great that you can customise the trip. The 'rest day' at Glendalough was also great — still walked 15 km! After these well-organised walks, we continued to enjoy the south of Ireland. We still look back with great pleasure on the unforgettable walking days in 2013 on the Cooley and Mourne mountains.

title: The hikes were absolutely stunning
content: The hikes were absolutely stunning. It helps to be an experienced hiker to fully enjoy them. The routes were well marked, and the maps were easy to follow. We received a warm welcome at every B&B, and all the accommodations were excellent, each with its own unique charm. A big thank you to all the taxi drivers who took care of us. Everything was perfectly organised, and the drivers were always friendly and pleasant.

title: We are back in the Netherlands and thoroughly enjoyed the hikes on the Wicklow W
content: We are back in the Netherlands and thoroughly enjoyed the hikes on the Wicklow Way. It was often breathtakingly beautiful. We were warmly welcomed at all the B&Bs, with nice showers, comfortable beds, and lots of peace and quiet. We had a slight preference for one of the accommodations, where the hostess was especially kind. Compliments for the excellent care. We truly enjoyed this holiday, thanks in part to the good organisation and the friendly people who welcomed us everywhere. Not to forget, the wonderful driver who is truly 'one of a kind.' In short, it was fantastic!

title: Fantastic walking holiday along the Cooley Peninsula
content: Fantastic walking holiday along the Cooley Peninsula. The combination of mountain and coastal views was spectacular. All the accommodations were top-notch, and the local people were incredibly friendly. The route notes were detailed and accurate. A special mention to the excellent taxi service for luggage transfers - always on time and reliable.

title: An absolutely stunning hiking experience! Coming from South Africa, we found the
content: An absolutely stunning hiking experience! Coming from South Africa, we found the Irish landscape uniquely beautiful. The mix of mountains and sea views was perfect. All accommodations were excellent and the hosts incredibly friendly. The detailed route notes made navigation simple. A wonderful way to experience Irish hospitality!

title: Very well-organised walking tour with excellent attention to detail
content: Very well-organised walking tour with excellent attention to detail. The paths were clearly marked, and the daily route descriptions were precise. Wonderful B&Bs with friendly hosts who were always helpful with local recommendations. The landscape variety was impressive - from mountain paths to coastal walks. I will definitely return!

title: Thank you for all the wonderful arrangements and for making the trip so easy! I
content: Thank you for all the wonderful arrangements and for making the trip so easy! I had a wonderful time and already miss Ireland!

title: Magnifique! A wonderful blend of mountains and sea views
content: Magnifique! A wonderful blend of mountains and sea views. The local hospitality was outstanding, and the hiking routes were perfectly planned. Loved discovering the ancient Celtic sites along the way. The route documentation was very detailed and helpful. A perfect way to discover the real Ireland!

title: Embarking on a walking tour in Ireland's west with Walking Holiday Ireland was a
content: Embarking on a walking tour in Ireland's west with Walking Holiday Ireland was an exceptional experience. The moderate hikes were perfectly complemented by the hospitality of the B&B hosts, who were consistently warm and welcoming. The daily journeys unveiled breathtaking landscapes, deepening my admiration for Ireland's beauty. It's an adventure I wholeheartedly endorse!

title: Lovely experiences (we've walked with them twice before!)
content: Lovely experiences (we've walked with them twice before!). I'd particularly recommend the Dingle walk, but all of our trips have had very nice accommodations and amazing scenery. The booking process is very easy, and the luggage transfer is smooth and simple. The hosts have been kind and helpful. Hiking instructions are very easy to follow and the paths are well marked - lots of options for different fitness levels. Great company!

title: Great trip on the Wicklow Way
content: Great trip on the Wicklow Way. Beautiful routes, well marked, and easy to follow via the Outdoor Active app. Cliff (and the team) were very quick to answer incidental questions via WhatsApp. Even a request for help with walking sticks could be quickly arranged and resolved. All in all a nice trip, definitely recommended.

title: Dear Cliff, we returned yesterday from our lovely walking holiday in Ireland
content: Dear Cliff, we returned yesterday from our lovely walking holiday in Ireland. We enjoyed the country and the people again during the walking days.

title: Fortunately, we didn't need your help number during our walking adventure in Nor
content: Fortunately, we didn't need your help number during our walking adventure in Northern Ireland last week, but it felt safe to have your number at hand. We had a marvellous holiday and were very lucky with the weather. The trip was very well organised. The hiking routes were clear, with the elevation profile with coloured track types, and especially the QR codes, so we never got lost. The driver who collected us at the airport and brought us to the starting point of the first two hikes was an entertaining guide, and we were very well cared for in all of the B&Bs. The last one especially was very impressive. All in all: maybe my best holiday ever (and I'm 61!). So a big thank you!

title: The Barrow Way was an absolute gem! I had such a fantastic time on my self-guide
content: The Barrow Way was an absolute gem! I had such a fantastic time on my self-guided walking tour from Carlow to St Mullins. The scenery was breathtaking and it was so wonderful to explore such a picturesque area of Ireland. Many thanks for this wonderful experience - I will be recommending Walking Holiday Ireland to all my friends!

title: Coming from Australia, we weren't sure what to expect from Irish hiking, but we
content: Coming from Australia, we weren't sure what to expect from Irish hiking, but we were blown away! The Cooley Peninsula's landscape is magical - from misty mountains to stunning coastlines. Walking Holiday Ireland's organisation was impeccable. The B&Bs were charming and our hosts provided great local insights. Even with some typical Irish weather, it was an unforgettable experience.

title: I went to Ireland with my son for 5 days where we did part of the Wicklow Way
content: I went to Ireland with my son for 5 days where we did part of the Wicklow Way. This was well arranged by Cliff at short notice.

title: Op dag 1 geslapen in de B&B in Lordship en na een stevig Iers ontbijt een mooie
content: Op dag 1 geslapen in de B&B in Lordship en na een stevig Iers ontbijt een mooie wandeling gemaakt. Op de tweede dag een prachtige wandeling naar Carlingford, een prachtige plaats aan de kust met een B&B 'uit de kunst' en een perfecte plek voor een rondwandeling. Ook voor vertier en goed eten is gezorgd. We hebben er dan ook nog een dag aangeplakt. Samengevat: een prachtig land, ongelooflijk vriendelijke en beleefde mensen en een prima organisatie.
review_text_en: On day 1 stayed in the B&B in Lordship and after a hearty Irish breakfast made a lovely walk. On the second day a wonderful walk to Carlingford, a beautiful coastal town with an outstanding B&B and a perfect base for exploring. Entertainment and good food were also taken care of. We even added an extra day. In summary: a beautiful country, incredibly friendly and polite people, and excellent organisation.

title: With 15 Nordic walkers we arrived at the Ballymascanlon Hotel near Dundalk, a ve
content: With 15 Nordic walkers we arrived at the Ballymascanlon Hotel near Dundalk, a very good hotel in the middle of a golf course. The whole week we were transferred in a little bus with a private chauffeur. We walked four times (15-20 km), with and without Cliff, in the Cooley and Mourne Mountains. One evening we met real Irish musicians. And we ate in a real Irish steak restaurant. The last day we visited Dublin. All was very well organised by Cliff.

title: As a couple, we enjoyed a beautiful walking holiday organised by Cliff Wayenberg
content: As a couple, we enjoyed a beautiful walking holiday organised by Cliff Wayenberg of Walking Holiday Ireland. The six days of walking in the Dundalk area, Carlingford and the Mourne Mountains were a good combination of different types of scenery, from easy walking to steep climbs. Walking distances each day were a bit longer and more difficult, giving a nice challenge every day. B&Bs located in towns with lots to see and to do in the evening, and all with very enthusiastic hosts. We stayed two nights in each B&B, giving a good opportunity to learn more about a city. In summary: very well organised, well balanced and beautiful holiday!

title: Wat een leuke vakantie! Hartstikke bedankt Cliff en collega's
content: Wat een leuke vakantie! Hartstikke bedankt Cliff en collega's. Wij hebben echt zo'n leuke vakantietocht gehad op de Barrow Way. Onze tocht op de Wicklow Way een paar jaar terug was fantastisch, vandaar dat we terug zijn gekomen en dit was weer een super vakantie. Alle accommodatie was weer super en de route was geweldig. Echt top!
review_text_en: What a great holiday! Many thanks to Cliff and team. We had such a wonderful trip on the Barrow Way. Our Wicklow Way trip a few years ago was fantastic - that's why we came back and this was again a super holiday. All accommodation was again superb and the route was wonderful. Absolutely top!

title: The Barrow Way was an absolute gem! Many thanks for this wonderful experience
content: The Barrow Way was an absolute gem! Many thanks for this wonderful experience. We loved the tranquil walks and friendly B&Bs on this trip. Everything was arranged perfectly and we loved the recommendations for the restaurants and sights along the way. We will definitely be back to walk the Wicklow Way next year!

title: Super nice - you come to places where less than 10 people walk by in a day, and
content: Super nice - you come to places where less than 10 people walk by in a day, and the population is very friendly and helpful.

reviewer_name: J. en S. van der Meer
title: Perfect organisation from start to finish
content: Perfect organisation from start to finish. The walking routes were well-marked, and the daily distances were very manageable. All B&Bs were excellent, with comfortable beds and beautiful breakfasts. The views of Carlingford Lough and the Mourne Mountains were spectacular. Cliff's team was always available on WhatsApp for questions. Highly recommended!

title: Never been to Ireland but why would you go there? Only for the Whiskey and the G
content: Never been to Ireland but why would you go there? Only for the Whiskey and the Guinness? Just try, we thought. The beautiful countryside, the friendly people, cosy pubs and it is wonderfully quiet. It was all great!

title: Never been to Ireland but why would you go there? Only for the Whiskey and the G
content: Never been to Ireland but why would you go there? Only for the Whiskey and the Guinness? Just try, we thought. The beautiful countryside, the friendly people, cosy pubs - it is wonderfully quiet and people pay attention to each other. It was all great!

title: We are already a few days at home and look back on a wonderful time in Northern
content: We are already a few days at home and look back on a wonderful time in Northern Ireland. The 500+ stunning photos have been downloaded (perhaps one of the reasons for our slow walking pace!). All B&Bs were excellent - good beds, nice breakfast, quiet location and very friendly and helpful hosts. It was very special to really meet no one on the Moyle Way. We had 2 wonderful meals in the Anzac restaurant in Ballycastle after two wonderful days walking. The combination of your descriptions and the maps worked perfectly. Only praise for the B&Bs in Cushendall and Portstewart - they were super cosy. The last walk to Portstewart was also brilliant. It was dry but very windy. Again, it was a great experience for us; the friendliness and helpfulness of everyone, including yourself, made a great impression on us.

title: A delightful 5-day adventure! The hiking routes were diverse and beautiful, with
content: A delightful 5-day adventure! The hiking routes were diverse and beautiful, with breathtaking views of the mountains and sea. All B&Bs were charming and comfortable. The local restaurants recommended by our hosts were excellent. Very professional organisation by Walking Holiday Ireland.

title: We really enjoyed this fantastic hiking tour! Everything was well organised
content: We really enjoyed this fantastic hiking tour! Everything was well organised. Beautiful surroundings, great weather and quality accommodation.

title: Wonderful trip in beautiful surroundings
content: Wonderful trip in beautiful surroundings. Everything was well organized, including the transfers. Wicklow is so beautiful and we loved our hikes. The accommodation was all superb and our hosts were welcoming and very helpful. Many thanks for a fantastic holiday - we will be back soon!

title: The tour company arranged everything very well in Ireland
content: The tour company arranged everything very well in Ireland. The majority was arranged by Walking Holiday Ireland, and this was great. Air travel arranged by TUI and also nothing to criticise.

title: Beautiful nature
content: Beautiful nature. Super nice - you come to places where less than 10 people walk by in a day, and the population is very friendly and helpful.

title: Cliff's personal attention makes booking with Walking Holiday Ireland of added v
content: Cliff's personal attention makes booking with Walking Holiday Ireland of added value. Little things in which we were unsure, he helped us a lot. The trip could also be adapted to our wishes. In short: everything was well agreed both in advance and on the spot, nice B&Bs, clear information, beautiful routes. It is very nice to know - during an individual trip - that someone in the background can properly deal with any calamities.

title: My family and I had the pleasure of hiking this beautiful trail in June 2018
content: My family and I had the pleasure of hiking this beautiful trail in June 2018. The route description was very clear and very well organised. Thanks for a wonderful experience - highly recommended. Will definitely come back next year!

title: I was there with my eldest son
content: I was there with my eldest son. We loved the beautiful hills and coast, the Irish people (very kind and helpful) and the B&Bs we visited were nice and clean. Our hostesses prepared us a delicious breakfast every morning: that gave us the energy for our daily hikes.

title: Our first organised walking holiday and we enjoyed every minute of it
content: Our first organised walking holiday and we enjoyed every minute of it. Nice trails with beautiful views and very friendly people. When it was too dangerous, because of the heavy fog, to walk the trail as planned there were a lot of good alternatives. Thanks Cliff!

title: Ein wunderbarer Wanderurlaub! The combination of mountain trails and coastal pat
content: Ein wunderbarer Wanderurlaub! The combination of mountain trails and coastal paths was perfect. Very professional organisation with excellent accommodation choices. The route descriptions were precise and easy to follow. Lovely interaction with local people and beautiful landscapes everywhere.

title: The Cooley Peninsula exceeded all expectations! Perfect balance of challenging h
content: The Cooley Peninsula exceeded all expectations! Perfect balance of challenging hiking and comfortable accommodations. Loved the small villages and friendly locals. The route notes were detailed and helpful. Special thanks to the B&B hosts who went above and beyond to make our stay memorable.
themes: B&B hosts going above and beyond

title: Fantastic walking holiday with stunning views! Everything was perfectly arranged
content: Fantastic walking holiday with stunning views! Everything was perfectly arranged - from the detailed route descriptions to the comfortable B&Bs. The luggage transfer worked smoothly, and the hosts were all very welcoming. Beautiful combination of mountain and coastal scenery. Will definitely book another tour with Walking Holiday Ireland!

title: It was brilliant!
content: It was brilliant! We had a brilliant time and will definitely be back!

title: A great way to fully unwind
content: A great way to fully unwind. Beautiful nature, nice people. Everything perfectly arranged.

title: Prachtige reis
content: Prachtige reis. Je kunt volop genieten van de vakantie, alles is geregeld.
review_text_en: Beautiful trip. You can fully enjoy the holiday - everything is arranged.

title: Magnificent
content: Magnificent. Had a wonderful week in Ireland. Beautiful walks.

title: Very relaxing
content: Very relaxing. Beautiful nature and beautiful surroundings.

title: Beautiful hikes, well organised
content: Beautiful hikes, well organised. Personal guidance if you have any questions. Recommended!

title: What beautiful hikes and what beautiful views - wonderful, just a must!
content: What beautiful hikes and what beautiful views - wonderful, just a must!

title: Wicklow Way was definitely worth it
content: It's been a while since June 2024 that we walked the Wicklow Way. It was definitely worth it. The agreements made were well fulfilled. The B&Bs were all excellent, and the local taxi drivers were very helpful. In short, an amazing experience. Small tip: twice, we were forced to deviate from the route because conifers were being cut down. We walk without GPS, and the signposts had been removed.
whi_response: Cliff apologised, noted this is a periodic issue with managed Irish forests and announced the launch of a dedicated travel app.

title: Prachtige, pittige wandelvakantie gehad met partner
content: Prachtige, pittige wandelvakantie gehad met partner. De hotels/B&Bs waren super goed. Alles was goed geregeld en bij twijfel over het ophalen van de koffer, konden we snel even appen met Cliff. De bagage was goed geregeld. Helemaal top! Waarom geen 5 sterren: 1 accommodatie vonden wij wat minder, maar dat kan een ander weer een geweldige hostel vinden.
whi_response: Hallo Saskia, Bedankt voor je feedback en fijn om te horen dat je een fijne vakantie hebt gehad. Tot de volgende keer!
review_text_en: Had a beautiful, challenging walking holiday with my partner. The hotels/B&Bs were superb. Everything was well arranged, and when in doubt about luggage collection, we could quickly WhatsApp Cliff. Luggage was well handled. Absolutely top! Why not 5 stars: 1 accommodation we found less good, but someone else might love it.

title: Beautiful walking routes through the beautiful nature of Northern Ireland
content: Beautiful walking routes through the beautiful nature of Northern Ireland. Arriving every day in, except for 1, neat and clean B&Bs and being welcomed by all very friendly and helpful people. Very hospitable and beautiful country.

title: Prachtige wandelvakantie
content: Prachtige wandelvakantie. Prima verzorgde reis met een prachtige wandelroute, welke prima is aangegeven. De algemene toelichting bij de tocht en in enkele gevallen de ligging en routes naar B&Bs is wel een verbeterpunt.
review_text_en: Beautiful walking holiday. Well-organised trip with a beautiful, well-marked walking route. The general walk notes and in some cases the directions to the B&B accommodations could be improved.

title: Beautiful walking routes through the beautiful nature of Northern Ireland
content: Beautiful walking routes through the beautiful nature of Northern Ireland. Arriving every day in, except for 1, neat and clean B&Bs and being welcomed by all very friendly and helpful people. Very hospitable and beautiful country.

title: The trip was very nice
content: The trip was very nice. Positive points are that you can make beautiful walks in this area. Too bad that the difference per day was so great. Where one day you walk along breathtaking cliffs, the other day you walk for a large part along/over the road. The difference in distance is also large - 20 km max, 13 km minimum.

title: Prachtige reis in een prachtige omgeving
content: Prachtige reis in een prachtige omgeving. Alles prima geregeld, ook de transfers. De routebeschrijvingen naar de slaaplocaties hadden wel uitgebreider gemogen. Het is vervelend aan het eind van een lange wandeltocht nog te moeten zoeken naar de slaaplocatie. De laatste wandeldag was te lang, veel kilometers en veel stijgen en dalen.
review_text_en: Beautiful trip in a beautiful environment. Everything well organised, including transfers. The route descriptions to the sleeping locations could have been more detailed - it is annoying to have to search for your accommodation at the end of a long day's walk. The last walking day was too long, with many kilometres and a lot of climbing and descending.

title: Erg genoten
content: Erg genoten. Prachtige omgeving, goed weer en fijne accommodaties. Behalve de laatste…
review_text_en: Really enjoyed it. Beautiful surroundings, good weather and nice accommodations. Except the last one…
